name: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
my_review: A breathtaking masterpiece that redefines the JRPG genre with stunning visuals, deeply emotional storytelling, and innovative real-time combat mechanics. An absolute must-play.
what_i_liked: Innovative blend of turn-based and real-time combat
Emotionally gripping narrative with memorable characters
Perfect pacing throughout the 40+ hour journey
Boss battles that feel truly epic
needs_improvement: Some minor performance hiccups on base consoles
